Parameter: Cost per person screened (CrAg test + delivery)
Source / notes: Blended estimate: reflexed lab ($5-7) and POC ($15-20)

Parameter: Additional cost per CrAg-positive patient (pre-emptive Rx + monitoring)
Source / notes: Pre-emptive fluconazole ($20) + follow-up visits ($15) + LP if symptomatic ($15)

Parameter: Additional cost per confirmed CM case (AMBITION regimen + hospitalization)
% of CrAg+ with confirmed CM (needing AMBITION treatment)
Source / notes: ~25% of CrAg+ patients have active CM at diagnosis
Calculation: screening cost + CrAg prevalence × (treatment + CM% × CM treatment)

Parameter: 1-year mortality among CrAg+ without pre-emptive treatment
Source / notes: Conservative estimate based on multiple sources

Parameter: Mortality reduction from pre-emptive fluconazole treatment
Source / notes: Based on modeling and observational data
No RCT of screening program; REMSTART HR 0.65 was non-significant
Uganda/SA data extrapolated to other SSA settings
Calculation: CrAg+ patients × baseline mortality × adjusted reduction

Parameter: Moral weight per death averted (UoV) — age-weighted
Source / notes: GiveWell 2020 moral weights, weighted for CM age distribution

Parameter: Ad-hoc: morbidity averted (CM-related disability, DALYs from survivors)
Value per dollar spent on benchmark (GiveDirectly)

Source / notes: Reflexed screening: marginal cost ~$5/result (SA NHLS data)
